_fixture_note: Shaped like the Zotero Web API v3's batched item-creation response (SPEC.md §8.6, via pyzotero's zot.create_items([...])) — a per-index success/failure/unchanged map, which is exactly the source data Task 1C/3B must translate into CONTRACTS.md's per-PMID ZoteroPushResult shape. Index 0 succeeds; index 1 fails (used to exercise the partial-batch-failure path, §8.7/§9.2's ZoteroExport tracking). Used by Task 1C's mocked zotero client tests and Task 2C's MSW handlers.
